name: Berwick Civic Complex
description: Berwick Civic Complex is a place to play pickleball in Berwick, LA. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Franklin Recreation Center
description: Franklin Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Franklin, LA. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The court is free.
